title: Container Network Interface (CNI)
description: Master the Container Network Interface (CNI) for integrating networking solutions into Kubernetes. Evaluate Overlay (VxLAN/Geneve) versus Underlay (BGP) networking models based on performance and latency characteristics.
objectives: Master the Container Network Interface (CNI) for integrating networking solutions into Kubernetes.
Evaluate Overlay (VxLAN/Geneve) versus Underlay (BGP) networking models based on performance and latency characteristics.
